name: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10-20 vendor invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10-20 vendor invoices/month, delays in onboarding causes late payments to vendors. We streamline the vendor onboarding process instead of manual vendor onboarding processes.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10-20 vendor invoices/month
problem_solved: Delays in vendor onboarding due to manual verification processes.
